nasb.text: And He sat down opposite the treasury, and began observing how the people were putting money into the treasury; and many rich people were putting in large sums.

esv.text: And he sat down opposite the treasury and watched the people putting money into the offering box. Many rich people put in large sums.

cnv.text: 耶穌面對銀庫坐著，看著大家怎樣把錢投入庫中。許多有錢的人投入很多的錢。

ccb.text: 然后，耶稣走到圣殿的奉献箱对面坐下，看大家怎样奉献。很多财主奉献了大量的钱。

csbs.text: 耶稣面对奉献箱坐着，看众人怎样把钱投入奉献箱里。许多富有的人投进了很多钱。
